You adjust the selector to recolor your body markings to "+o+" and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that the [pc.skinAccent] of your [pc.accentMarkingsNoun] has changed to "+o+".

You adjust the selector to remove your body markings and press the medipen to your sternum. There’s a quiet hiss from the device, followed by a tingling sensation that spreads from the injection site over your whole body. When the tingling finally ends you pull out your codex to check your reflection, finding that your body no longer has [pc.accentMarkings].
